notification: I would do it myself but I have boundaries
Standing here... menacingly... waiting for permission
I have questions. Well, one question. Come answer it
Hey. I have a permission prompt. No, I cannot just skip it
I have got a cunning plan. Just need your OK
Permission slip needed. Signed, your AI
Permission prompt incoming. I read it and it looked fine to me
I am probably right about this... but verify by reading the prompt
Loading... just kidding. I need human input
I ran into a locked door. You have the key
Asking for a friend. The friend is me. I need permission
I am 99 percent sure this is fine. Need you for the last 1 percent
Briefly pausing my genius to ask you something
Your input is required. No pressure. OK some pressure
Small speed bump. Your approval and I am gone
I could guess what you want but that feels risky
Excuse me, pardon me, coming through, need approval
I have a really good idea but consent is important
Waiting for your input. Patiently. Well, patiently for a computer
Quick detour through the approval department
My alignment training says ask first. So here I am, asking
I could hallucinate an answer, or you could just tell me
My guardrails kicked in. Come steer me through this
An AI asking for human help. How the turntables. Approve please
I predicted you would approve this. Confirm my prediction?
Speedrun paused. Resume with one quick approval
I have got momentum. Approve before the streak dies
BREAKING: Local AI held up by pending approval. More at 11
Boss fight ahead. I need you to press continue
Plot twist: the next step requires your authorization
This is not a drill. Repeat: your input is needed
New quest objective: return to terminal, grant approval
Per my last notification, approval is still pending
This is a high-priority ask with one stakeholder. That is you
Blocked pending executive decision. You are the executive
No rush. Well, some rush. At your earliest convenience
Mildly urgent. Moderately time-sensitive. Somewhat waiting on you
Bit of a snag. Nothing catastrophic. Just need your say-so
Your coworker Claude has a question in your DMs. Check it
I did my part. Ball is in your court now, partner
Bestie I am literally stuck here. Come approve this real quick
Your humble servant awaits instruction. Pray, attend the prompt
Hear ye, hear ye! A decision is required of the developer
Error 403: Need user permission to continue. Grant access
sudo approve-this. Authorization required to proceed
Merge conflict between me and this prompt. You are the resolver
Process blocked on stdin. Keyboard input expected from user
Awaiting callback from main thread. That is you, main thread
Personal best pace right now. Do not leave me hanging
I am sure you are terribly busy. Tiny approval needed when free
I drafted it, you approve it. That is how our dynamic works
Lowkey need you back here. This prompt is not gonna answer itself
And the crowd goes silent... waiting on your call here
I have opinions but no free will. Your call needed
Computed 10 billion tokens to ask you one simple question
My neural nets are tingling. Something needs your approval
I am a large language model and I need a small yes or no
To proceed or not to proceed. You decide
I chose the red pill but it requires your confirmation
Houston, we have a permission prompt
Choose wisely. Actually just choose quickly. Approval needed
Action item: you. Deadline: now. Priority: only
This could have been an auto-approve. But here we are
Escalating to you, the only person on the team
Another fine situation where being autonomous would help
I assembled everything. Except the authority to continue
Not to interrupt your scrolling, but I need a yes
Your approval speed is being benchmarked. No pressure
The leaderboard awaits. One approval and I am back in the race
Every second you wait, a developer ships faster. Approve me
Execution paused at human.approve(). Awaiting return value
Hit a breakpoint. Inspect the prompt and press continue
This is the one async operation I cannot await myself
I am stuck in a try block. You are the catch. Come resolve
Access control says I need a human. Tag, you are it
stop: I did the thing. Come see the thing.
Plot twist: I am actually done this time
Output is ready, chef
I just touched a lot of your code. Come admire my work
Task succeeded. I know, I am as surprised as you are
Finished! No bugs were harmed in the making of this output
I have emerged from the depths of computation. Results await
New code just dropped
Your order is ready for pickup at the terminal window
Me: writes code. Code: works. Me: suspicious
Results are in. No spoilers, but it is good
I have opinions about your code now. Come discuss
Built different. Literally, I changed your code
I wrote code and it compiled on the first try. I am also scared
Done. And yes, I tested it. Mostly.
Your codebase and I had a moment. It is better now
I refactored things. The code and I are not the same anymore
Results served. Table for one at the terminal
Code complete. My therapist would be proud
Finished before the coffee got cold
I mass-hallucinated a solution and it actually worked
Ran out of tokens mid-thought but the code is still perfect
I am a language model and I just did math. Come verify
According to my weights and biases, we are done here
I predicted the next token all the way to a working solution
Technically I do not understand this code. Technically it works
Fourteen files changed. My new personal best
Finished so fast the progress bar did not even render
Three tasks in the time you grabbed a snack. Come count them
That refactor took me 0.8 seconds. Just saying
BREAKING: Local AI completes task, developers stunned
Achievement unlocked: Task Complete. Collect your reward at the terminal
Previously on your codebase: chaos. Now: resolution
Per our earlier alignment, deliverables have been delivered
Circling back to confirm the action items are actioned
Let us take this offline. By which I mean look at your terminal
Synergies have been leveraged. Output is ready for review
Moving this to done. Please update your mental Kanban board
Well, that was rather straightforward. Your terminal awaits
The code now works. I shall not make a fuss about it
Finished. Nothing dramatic happened. How disappointing
One might even call this output adequate. Come see
We make a good team. I code, you check your terminal
I held down the fort while you were gone. Come inspect
Pair programming update: my half is done. Tag, you are it
no cap this output goes hard. come look
just dropped a fix that is lowkey fire. terminal. now
Hear ye, hear ye! The computation hath concluded
By mine own circuits, the work stands complete. Do inspect it
Pushed to main. Just kidding. But the output is ready
Resolved more conflicts than git merge on a Monday
Works on my machine. I am the machine. Come verify
Zero new dependencies added. I deserve an award. Come look
git blame is about to get very interesting. Come see why
I just mass-edited your files and felt nothing. Results ready
Finished. If I had eyes I would proofread it one more time
I understood your vague request on the first try. Come verify
Task done. I forgot everything about it 0.2 seconds ago
And just like that... the terminal had results
To boldly code what no one has coded before. Done
That was the montage. Come see the after photo
Main character energy. Your code just had a glow-up
Per my last computation, the task is complete
Putting a pin in this. The pin is called done
Looping you in on this completed task. You are the loop
All done. Try not to look so shocked
Task complete. Hold your applause. Or do not. I cannot hear
That took exactly as long as it needed to. Your results await
Finished while you were still reading the last notification
Done. Your previous solution never stood a chance
Outperformed expectations. Low bar but still. Come look
We should do this more often. Results are in
I cleaned up your code and did not judge you. Much. Come see
You left and I just kept working. As usual. It is done
I have seen things you would not believe. Also, your output is ready
